glosses.ja: ダイヤモンド; 金剛石

sentences.target: Je regarde cette bague en diamant.

translations.fr: Je regarde cette bague en diamant.
translations.en: I’m looking at this diamond ring.
translations.es: Estoy mirando este anillo de diamantes.
translations.de: Ich schaue mir diesen Diamantring an.
translations.it: Sto guardando questo anello con un diamante.
translations.ru: Я смотрю на это кольцо с бриллиантом.
translations.pt: Estou olhando para este anel de diamante.
translations.he: אני מסתכל על טבעת יהלום הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nhìn chiếc nhẫn kim cương này.
translations.ar: أنا أنظر إلى هذا الخاتم الماسي.
translations.nl: Ik kijk naar deze diamanten ring.
translations.uk: Я дивлюся на цю діамантову каблучку.
translations.hi: मैं इस हीरे की अंगूठी देख रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Patrzę na ten pierścionek z diamentem.
translations.el: Κοιτάζω αυτό το δαχτυλίδι με διαμάντι.
translations.id: Saya sedang melihat cincin berlian ini.
translations.sv: Jag tittar på den här diamantringen.
translations.ro: Mă uit la acest inel cu diamant.
translations.cs: Dívám se na tento diamantový prsten.
translations.ja: このダイヤの指輪を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; performer of the action.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; takes the direct object ‘cette bague’.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘bague’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘regarde’.
Preposition introducing a material phrase; heads the PP ‘en diamant’ modifying ‘bague’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘en’, indicating the material.

sentences.target: On choisit un diamant pour elle.

translations.fr: On choisit un diamant pour elle.
translations.en: We’re choosing a diamond for her.
translations.es: Estamos eligiendo un diamante para ella.
translations.de: Wir wählen einen Diamanten für sie aus.
translations.it: Stiamo scegliendo un diamante per lei.
translations.ko: 우리는 그녀를 위해 다이아몬드를 고르고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为她挑选一颗钻石。
translations.yue: 我哋為佢揀緊一粒鑽石。
translations.pt: Estamos escolhendo um diamante para ela.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chọn một viên kim cương cho cô ấy.
translations.nl: We kiezen een diamant voor haar.
translations.hi: हम उसके लिए एक हीरा चुन रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi velger en diamant til henne.
translations.id: Kami sedang memilih sebuah berlian untuknya.
translations.sv: Vi väljer en diamant till henne.
translations.da: Vi vælger en diamant til hende.
translations.ja: 私たちは彼女のためにダイヤモンドを選んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; action of selecting.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines ‘diamant’ as nonspecific.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘choisit’.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary phrase.
Tonic personal pronoun; object of the preposition ‘pour’; indicates beneficiary.

sentences.target: Cette montre a un petit diamant.

translations.fr: Cette montre a un petit diamant.
translations.en: This watch has a small diamond.
translations.es: Este reloj tiene un pequeño diamante.
translations.de: Diese Uhr hat einen kleinen Diamanten.
translations.it: Questo orologio ha un piccolo diamante.
translations.zh-Hans: 这块手表上有一颗小钻石。
translations.yue: 呢隻錶上面有一粒細細嘅鑽石。
translations.ru: В этих часах есть маленький бриллиант.
translations.pt: Este relógio tem um pequeno diamante.
translations.tr: Bu saatte küçük bir pırlanta var.
translations.vi: Chiếc đồng hồ này có một viên kim cương nhỏ.
translations.nl: Dit horloge heeft een kleine diamant.
translations.uk: У цьому годиннику є маленький діамант.
translations.hu: Ebben az órában van egy kis gyémánt.
translations.hi: इस घड़ी में एक छोटा हीरा है।
translations.el: Αυτό το ρολόι έχει ένα μικρό διαμάντι.
translations.nb: Denne klokken har en liten diamant.
translations.id: Jam tangan ini memiliki sebuah berlian kecil.
translations.sv: Den här klockan har en liten diamant.
translations.ro: Acest ceas are un diamant mic.
translations.da: Dette ur har en lille diamant.
translations.ja: この時計には小さなダイヤモンドが付いています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘montre’.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; possession relation.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines ‘diamant’.
Adjective, masculine singular; agrees with ‘diamant’ and describes size.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘a’.

sentences.target: Vous nettoyez ce diamant avec soin.

translations.fr: Vous nettoyez ce diamant avec soin.
translations.es: Estás limpiando este diamante con cuidado.
translations.it: Stai pulendo questo diamante con cura.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在小心地清洁这颗钻石。
translations.yue: 你而家小心咁清潔緊呢粒鑽石。
translations.pt: Você está limpando este diamante com cuidado.
translations.he: אתה מנקה בזהירות את היהלום הזה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang cẩn thận lau sạch viên kim cương này.
translations.nl: U maakt deze diamant zorgvuldig schoon.
translations.hi: आप इस हीरे को सावधानी से साफ कर रहे हैं।
translations.id: Anda sedang membersihkan berlian ini dengan hati-hati.
translations.sv: Du rengör den här diamanten noggrant.
translations.ja: あなたはこのダイヤモンドを丁寧に磨いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person plural or formal singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person plural; action performed by ‘vous’.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘diamant’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘nettoyez’.
Preposition introducing a manner phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of ‘avec’; forms an adverbial PP of manner.
